message:
refactor: remove rusqlite FTS dual-backend, make frankensqlite sole DB engine; add targeted watch-once fast path and local source scanning

This removes the entire rusqlite-based FTS5 fallback layer that was
originally needed because frankensqlite's in-memory inverted index
couldn't read pre-existing on-disk FTS5 shadow tables. Now that the
primary lexical search engine is the Tantivy index built during
`cass index --full`, the dual-backend complexity is no longer justified.

Rusqlite FTS removal (search/query.rs, lib.rs, storage/sqlite.rs):
- Disable search_sqlite_fts5() — stub returns empty Vec instead of
  opening a separate rusqlite read-only connection and running the
  ~230-line MATCH query with filter/pagination/BM25 scoring
- Remove DoctorFtsTableState::QueryableViaRusqlite variant and the
  doctor --fix path that recreated FTS via rusqlite
- Replace rusqlite-based PRAGMA quick_check with frankensqlite-native
  query_row_map("PRAGMA quick_check(1)") in the doctor
- Gate materialize_fresh_fts_schema_via_rusqlite,
  ensure_fts_consistency_via_rusqlite, probe_database_health_via_rusqlite,
  and related helpers behind #[cfg(test)] (no longer called in prod)
- Remove fast_forward_schema_v13_fts_via_rusqlite() entirely
- Remove the FrankenStorage::open() close→rusqlite-bootstrap→reopen dance
  for fresh databases
- Convert doctor test schemas from rusqlite to frankensqlite connections

Indexer improvements (indexer/mod.rs):
- Rename remote_roots → additional_scan_roots throughout (semantic
  clarity: configured roots can be local backup directories, not just
  remote mirrors)
- Add should_run_targeted_watch_once_only() — when watch-once paths are
  supplied to an already-populated index, skip historical salvage and
  the broad incremental scan entirely, going straight to the targeted
  reindex of the specified paths
- Support local sources in build_scan_roots() via new
  expand_local_scan_root_path() helper (~/path expansion), not just
  remote mirror directories
- Change sync_sources_config_to_db() to iterate all config.sources
  instead of only config.remote_sources()
- Add classify_paths(prefer_explicit_paths=true) for watch-once mode:
  scan the exact file paths supplied rather than the entire root directory
- Change storage handle from Arc<Mutex<>> to Rc<Mutex<>> in watch mode
  (no cross-thread sharing needed without the rusqlite FTS repair step)
- Remove the close/reopen storage dance around post-index FTS repair
- Add serial_batch_chunk_size() with CASS_INDEXER_SERIAL_CHUNK_SIZE env
  var (default 128) for chunked conversation ingest to reduce memory
  pressure during large rebuilds
- Increase default commit intervals: conversations 1000→2000, messages
  5000→25000, bytes 16MB→64MB for better throughput on large corpora
- Add .truncate(false) to index-run.lock open to avoid silently wiping
  stale lock content on re-acquisition
- Flatten nested if-let chain in import_historical_batch_with_retry
  using let-chains

New tests:
- targeted_watch_once_only_requires_populated_incremental_run
- classify_paths_prefers_explicit_watch_once_paths
- build_scan_roots_includes_configured_local_source_paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
